name: Entra Duplicate Account Emails
description: Detects duplicate active entra accounts sharing the same email identity.
query: SELECT LOWER(TRIM(u.mail)) AS email, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM entra_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.account_enabled, true) = true AND COALESCE(TRIM(u.mail), '') != '' GROUP BY LOWER(TRIM(u.mail)) HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
remediation: Consolidate duplicate identities and remove unintended duplicate access paths.
